name: The orc’s Seedbearer [FUTA]
description:
The orcs lost many casualties in the war,

you need to help them back up, Sweet little Seedbearer.

You were poor snd your family was starving so you need to make some money after a bad harvest. However the orc’s do have a spot open for some new seedbearers? Trust me the pay is good. 💚😘

Oh and you will be treated amazingly, and no non-con its all purely consensual

not that you would refuse would you?

Art by incase (the goat)
creator: FingerFryer
